title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Question Reroll – Spend XP to swap ou
content:
✔ Question Reroll – Spend XP to swap out a mastery exam question.
✔ Secret Use (Revealed in Week 14) – A hidden advantage for students who saved 100+ XP.

The Secret Use of XP (Final Week Surprise)

✔ Students with 100+ XP unlock “The Lost Manuscript Challenge.”
✔ They receive a scrambled, partially lost literary text and must reconstruct it using class concepts.
✔ If successful, they can erase their lowest essay grade.

✅ Why This Works
• Encourages strategic XP spending rather than hoarding or wasting it.
• Introduces an unexpected “elite challenge” for highly engaged students.
• Ties gamification into real literary reconstruction exercises.

📜 6. Final Lock-In Questions

1. Should XP decay if it’s not spent by a certain time?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 147 (chunk 147/555)
